title: ATP Merchant Order Handling Flow
interaction_flow: Caller → merchantAgent: start({ services, onOrder, pollMs })
Hub (HTTP) → merchantAgent: { ok: true } | { ok: false, error }
alt [hello failed] → merchantAgent sets _running=false, returns early
merchantAgent → a2aProtocol: getNodeId() — logs registered node
Hub (HTTP) → merchantAgent: { ok: true } | { ok: false, error }
defaultOrderHandler → merchantAgent: proofPayload { result, output, pass_rate:1.0, processed_at, processor:'evolver-default' }
hubClient → Hub (HTTP): POST /a2a/atp/deliver { sender_id, order_id, proof_payload }
Hub (HTTP) → merchantAgent: { ok: true, data } | { ok: false, error }
key_relationships: merchantAgent imports submitDelivery, getMerchantTier, listProofs from hubClient
merchantAgent imports sendHelloToHub, startHeartbeat, stopHeartbeat, consumeAvailableWork, getNodeId from a2aProtocol
hubClient imports getHubUrl, buildHubHeaders, getNodeId from a2aProtocol
defaultOrderHandler is the default opts.onOrder callback wired externally (not auto-imported by merchantAgent)
hubClient._hubPost wraps fetch() with AbortSignal.timeout and buildHubHeaders

method_signatures.merchantAgent.start: async start(opts: { services: object[], onOrder: async (order) => proofPayload, pollMs?: number }): void
method_signatures.merchantAgent.getStatus: async getStatus(): { node_id, running, tier, recent_proofs }
method_signatures.defaultOrderHandler: defaultOrderHandler(order: { title, signals, ... }): { result, output, pass_rate, processed_at, processor }
method_signatures.defaultOrderHandler.resolveAtpServices: resolveAtpServices(): service[] — reads EVOLVER_ATP_SERVICES env or returns default Code Evolution service
method_signatures.hubClient.submitDelivery: submitDelivery(orderId: string, proofPayload: object): Promise<{ ok, data } | { ok, error }>
method_signatures.hubClient._hubPost: _hubPost(pathSuffix: string, body: object, timeoutMs?: number): Promise<{ ok, data|error }>

branching_logic.submitDelivery_guard: only called if proofPayload is truthy AND order.atp_order_id is present

important_notes: merchantAgent is a module-level singleton (_running flag prevents double-start). defaultOrderHandler is synchronous (not async); merchantAgent awaits opts.onOrder which wraps it. hubClient uses fetch with AbortSignal.timeout for all Hub calls. Poll interval default is 30,000ms.
